title: coelogyne pollucifera
intro: Coelogyne pollucifera, also known as the Moonlight Orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory issues. The health benefits of Coelogyne pollucifera are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are thought to possess antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
